attributes.name: OIC - LTS Family Skate Party (Thursday, July 2nd)
attributes.description:
Spring 2026 Family Skate Party All skaters enrolled in any Learn to Skate program and their family members are invited to our end of season Family Skate Party. Come have fun slate and playing games on and off the ice.

Thursday, July 2nd, @5:30pm-6:30pm 

Please RSVP at the front desk.
